title: Refined Storage Mixin
body:
Official MCT Discord Server [Here](https://discord.com/invite/ujY2mV9).


![logo](https://i.postimg.cc/JhJmNkDQ/MCT-Clear.jpg)


Major performance fixes for Refined Storage in 1.20.1



Refined Storage Mixin is a performance-focused addon for Refined Storage that reduces server lag in large networks.



It adds configurable update throttling (default: every 20 ticks) while letting key nodes—importers, exporters, interfaces, crafters, and many addon equivalents—bypass throttling for fast, responsive transfers when active.



Features dynamic idle sleeping, EnderIO conduit connection fixes (on load and placement), lazy energy calculation, unloaded chunk skipping, and other optimizations—all fully configurable.

Most importantly it fixes the deadlock async corruption on chunk unloads.

![band-aid rafined storage](https://i.postimg.cc/J0j4XP4H/rsmixin.png)



Before RS Mixin was applied
![screenshot 1](https://i.postimg.cc/FR1L0g0T/Screenshot-2026-01-16-023005.png)

After RS Mixin was applied
![screenshot 2](https://i.postimg.cc/hv1cjNhr/image2.png)

You may use this mod in any modpack, and put a link back to this page as a courtesy!
